caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

obligations.title: Provide clear notice before consent
obligations.description: Provide plain-language notice of processing purposes, data categories, rights, and grievance channels.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies to personal data processing requiring consent.

obligations.title: Obtain valid consent
obligations.description: Collect free, specific, informed, unconditional, and unambiguous consent where required.

obligations.title: Enable withdrawal of consent
obligations.description: Provide practical mechanisms for data principals to withdraw consent.
obligations.applicability_notes: Withdrawal should be as easy as giving consent.

obligations.title: Support access and summary rights
obligations.description: Provide data principals access to personal data processing summaries and related information.
obligations.applicability_notes: Include response timelines and identity verification.

obligations.title: Support correction and erasure rights
obligations.description: Provide request workflows for correction, completion, updating, and erasure as applicable.
obligations.applicability_notes: Coordinate with processors and downstream systems.

obligations.title: Operate grievance redress mechanism
obligations.description: Implement grievance intake, tracking, and resolution channels for data principal complaints.
obligations.applicability_notes: Designate response owners and escalation timelines.

obligations.title: Implement reasonable security safeguards
obligations.description: Adopt technical and organizational safeguards to prevent personal data breaches.
obligations.applicability_notes: Risk-based controls should be reviewed periodically.

obligations.title: Notify breaches as required
obligations.description: Notify the Board and affected data principals as required in the event of personal data breaches.
obligations.applicability_notes: Define breach classification and notification criteria.

obligations.title: Delete data when purpose is met
obligations.description: Delete personal data once purpose is fulfilled and retention is no longer required.

obligations.title: Apply children’s data protections
obligations.description: Implement age-related safeguards and parental consent where legally required.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies when services involve children’s personal data.

obligations.title: Meet significant data fiduciary duties
obligations.description: For designated significant data fiduciaries, implement required governance, auditing, and impact assessment duties.
obligations.applicability_notes: Apply when designation criteria are met by authority.

obligations.title: Maintain accountability records
obligations.description: Maintain records showing compliance with consent, rights handling, safeguards, and grievance management obligations.
obligations.applicability_notes: Supports regulator inquiry and internal assurance.

content_versions.obligation_text: Provide clear processing notice before collecting consent.
Obtain valid consent where required under the Act.
Enable simple withdrawal of consent and associated processing updates.
Respond to access and processing summary requests.
Support correction and erasure request handling.
Maintain grievance redress operations for data principals.
Implement reasonable security safeguards for personal data.
Notify required parties in the event of personal data breaches.
Delete personal data when retention is no longer required.
Apply children’s data protections and age-related safeguards.
Comply with additional duties for significant data fiduciaries.
Maintain accountability records evidencing compliance duties.
